name: topgun
description: Find, compare, security-audit, and install the best available skill for any job from 16 active registries.

interface.shortDescription: Find, compare, audit, and install the best available skill for any job.
interface.longDescription: TopGun packages the shared skills bundle for Codex and Claude, exposing the same orchestrated skill-discovery pipeline, bundled hook enforcement, and installation workflow from a single plugin repository.
defaultPrompt: Use TopGun to find the best skill for this task.
Search registries, compare candidates, and audit the winner with TopGun.
Install the safest available skill with TopGun.
